title: AFAuth service directory listing
description: Schema for a single listing record in the non-normative AFAuth service directory. Informational; see spec/directory.md and AFAP-0003.

service_did.description: The service's DID, matching the value declared in the cached discovery_doc. Both did:web and did:key are accepted on equal terms (see spec/directory.md §3).

discovery_url.description: URL of the /.well-known/afauth document the listing describes. MUST be an https:// URL.

discovery_doc.description: Cached snapshot of /.well-known/afauth taken at fetched_at. Validates against schemas/well-known.json.

fetched_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent successful discovery_doc fetch.

status.description: Listing status. See spec/directory.md §7 for transitions.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags supplied by the controller. The directory imposes no tag vocabulary in this version.

title.description: Human-readable service name supplied by the controller.

description.description: Human-readable service description supplied by the controller.

_meta.description: Reserved for future extensions. Federation conventions for namespacing and third-party annotations are deliberately unspecified in this version.
